title: How to apply for pre-claim approval - Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives - Canada.ca
content:
## How to apply for pre-claim approval
Apply for optional pre-claim approval before you begin your SR&ED project.

## What is pre-claim approval
Pre-claim approval allows businesses to have their planned work evaluated to ensure it meets SR&ED requirements before incurring significant costs. Learn more: Optional pre-claim approval
The pre-claim approval application is optional . If you want to submit an SR&ED claim without pre-claim approval, go to: How to prepare your SR&ED claim .

## Criteria for pre-claim approval
Your planned work must meet all the eligibility requirements for an SR&ED tax incentive . In addition, you must meet all the following criteria for pre-claim approval.
- Be either a Canadian-controlled private corporation or other Canadian corporation, or a partnership
- Have a gross business income of less than $25M
- Be in good standing with the CRA
- Not have already been claimed in a previous tax year
- Not involve issues that may be currently under litigation
Follow the steps below to apply for pre-claim approval for SR&ED tax incentives.
- Request a case number Confirm you meet the criteria and get the case number you need to submit your application

### Request a case number
Confirm you meet the criteria and get the case number you need to submit your application
- Complete your application Answer questions about your project, gather and submit your supporting documents

### Complete your application
Answer questions about your project, gather and submit your supporting documents
- Submit your application Upload your application in My Business Account in your CRA account

### Submit your application
Upload your application in My Business Account in your CRA account
- After you apply Meet with the CRA and receive your decision
Meet with the CRA and receive your decision

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
